calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulated Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Martinez of the Law Office of James Martinez 510-444-7700 for plaintiff and moving party.
Sonia Corea (415-656-7249) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.

Not argued. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF JILMA COREA Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulated Judgment is Off calendar. Matter resolved. Parties met and conferred in the hall and exchanged the following: (1) Grant Deed executed within 10 court days of November 16, 2015; (2) Will executed within10 court days of November 16, 2015; (3) Special Needs Trust documents executed within 90 court days of November 16, 2015; (4) check for $20,000. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulated Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Continued To Sep-28-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JILMA COREA'S MOTION TO ENFORCE STIPULATED JUDGMENT

Appearances: James Martinez of the Law Office of James Martinez (510.444.7700) for plaintiff and moving party; Sonia Corea (415.656.7249) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.

Discussed and the Court continues the matter to September 28, 2016 at 9:30 am in department 501. Parties are to present to the Court at the hearing: (1) Grant Deed; (2) Will; (3) Special Needs Trust documents; (4) check for $20,000. Mr. Martinez to provide notice. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Martinez of Law Office of James Martinez telephone number 510-444-7700 for Plaintiff.
Wayne Lesser telephone number 415-563-2111 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SONIA COREA's Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions is granted (see order for full text). Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
